data.body: Done. Added T1 (agent-step runtime validation: violation fails, validator-failure distinct, contract-less skipped) + T3/T4 (CRLF/BOM-in-front-matter-value safe round-trip pinned). T2/T8 already covered by test_execution_mode_dispatch.py (no-tools on real run path + output_schema). 32 new+adjacent tests green, lint clean.
